scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix server run test && npm --prefix client run test
scripts.test:e2e:prepare: npm --prefix server run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm --prefix server run prisma:seed
scripts.check: npm run db:generate && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.verify:push: npm run check && npm run test:e2e:prepare && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:ci: npm run db:generate && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:e2e:prepare && npm run test:integration && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:production
